channel.title: Home on Husenjan
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Husenjan

item.title: HHKB Type-S Review
item.description: A review of HHKB Type-S keyboard.

item.title: AZ-500 Review
item.description: A post about my experience with studying and taking the AZ-500 certification.

item.title: AZ-104 Review
item.description: A post about my experience with studying and taking the AZ-104 certification.

item.title: OSCP Review
item.description: A post about my experience with studying and taking the OSCP certification.

item.title: Intel x86 Assembly
item.description: Learning x86 assembly on Windows 11/10/8 can be difficut for beginners; In this documentation I’ll go through setting up Netwide Assembler (NASM) on Windows and guide you through basics of x86 assembly.

item.title: Red Team
item.description: Methodology Enumerate TCP ports: # Quick TCP Scan rustscan -a "[IP]" # Aggressive Scan nmap -sV -sC -p "[PORTS]" "[IP]" -o nmap.

item.title: C++ Hooking Methods
item.description: In this documentation, I’ll go through the different hooking methods in C++.

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Most recently released documents. C++ Hooking Methods Intel x86 Assembly
